title: Craftable Ores!
description: This mod adds ore crafting recipes for duplication and decorations without the need of a silk touch pickaxe
body:
**Craftable Ores!**
==========================
This mod makes it so that you can craft ores.

It includes:
- Diamond
- Gold
- Redstone
- Iron
- Coal
- Emerald
- Copper
- Lapis
- The deepslate versions
- Nether Gold
- Nether Quartz

Check Crafting Recipes in the Gallery

_**Note**_:
- Items shown in the gallery are stone, netherrack and deepslate and their respective ores.
- Those are not cobbled deepslate, smooth stone, etc.
- The items in the recipe are the old textures
